function identity(x) {

function normalize(a, b) {
  return (b -= (a = +a))

      : constants(isNaN(b) ? NaN : 0.5);

function clamper(a, b) {
  var t;
  if (a > b) t = a, a = b, b = t;
  return function(x) { return Math.max(a, Math.min(b, x)); };
}
